title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Agra office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited!
